questions.question_text: Differentiate between sensors & transducers giving suitable examples.

What is a Gas Sensor? Write their Advantages, Disadvantages and Applications?
Explain design and fabrication process of Force Sensors?

A strain gauge have a gauge factor of 3·7. It is bonded to a metal bar which is 'stretched' from 10 cm to 10·25 cm by application of force. What would be the % change in resistance? It the unstrained value of resistance is 240 ohms, what is the value of the strain produced?
